description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a landscaped lot, featuring a dark gabled roof and light-colored exterior walls. The property includes a driveway leading to a detached garage, a fenced backyard with a swimming pool, and several mature trees and shrubs providing shade and privacy. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch, and the windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern along the front and sides. The lot is bordered by a sidewalk and a road, with manicured lawns and garden beds enhancing the curb appeal. The garage is positioned at the front left of the property, while the pool and patio area are located at the rear. The overall design reflects a blend of traditional and suburban residential styles, with practical outdoor amenities.
description: A single-story bungalow with a dark gabled roof, detached garage, front porch, and a backyard pool, surrounded by landscaped gardens and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front and left side view showing the main entrance, driveway, detached garage, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the side garden with trees and shrubs.
description_view_2: Rear and right side view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, patio area, and mature trees.
description_view_3: Direct rear view focusing on the backyard pool, patio, and the back facade of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
